name: Legends of the Ramayana with Amish
original_name: Legends of the Ramayana with Amish
overview: Acclaimed author Amish Tripathi traverses 5,000 kilometers in the footsteps of Rama, India's biggest cultural hero. He travels to key locations, mapping myth with geology, customs and belief to bring the legends of Rama's travels alive.

trailers.title: Ramayan Ke Rahasya  | Legends Of The Ramayana with Amish | discovery+ originals
